title: Device Settings  - Custom Button - Teams Detected
scenario: Custom Button "Other Providers" option is greyed out and inaccessible when Microsoft Teams is connected on Falcon headsets
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
Ensure a Falcon headset (e.g., Voyager 5200, Voyager 4320, etc.) is paired and connected to the Android device.
Ensure the same headset is also connected to a PC running Microsoft Teams.
Navigate to Home → Device Settings → [Connected Falcon Headset Name].
Locate the 'Custom Button' settings option and tap it.
Observe the two options displayed: 'Microsoft Teams' (selected by default) and 'Other Providers' (greyed out).
Read the message shown below the options.
Attempt to tap the 'Other Providers' option.
expected: The 'Custom Button' settings page shows 'Microsoft Teams' selected by default and 'Other Providers' greyed out. A message reads: 'Microsoft Teams is connected. Other Providers is not available when Microsoft Teams is connected.' Tapping 'Other Providers' does nothing as it is inaccessible.
